Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
203 
MFP_LVS_WTH_FMLY_CD 
LABEL: 
Money Follows Person (MFP) — Lives with Family or Non-Participant Code 
DESCRIPTION: A code indicating if the beneficiary lives with his/her family or is not a participant in the MFP program; 
most recent in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: MFP_LVS_WTH_FMLY_CD 
LONG NAME: MFP_LVS_WTH_FMLY_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
Money
